chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6293 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.26323/2025 2. For hearing of main case 10.03.2026 Mr. Shahzad Qamar Abbas, Advocate for the petitioner Mrs. Shazia Hanjrah, DAG alongwith I.O Ghazanfar Ali, Inspector, FIA, AMC Circle, Karachi ---------------------- I.O is present and submits that statement of the petitioner has been recorded and inquiry has also been concluded, therefore, purpose of this petition has been served, hence, seeks its disposal accordingly. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and does not wish to press this petition provided respondents may be directed not to harass the petitioner and to act strictly in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
